name: Joint Velocity & Acceleration Profiling
description: A robotics engineer is commissioning a robot arm for a high-speed packaging line. Validate the motion program in the CoppeliaSim scene 'messaging/movementViaRemoteApi.ttt' (ZMQ Remote API port 23000) against rated velocity (180°/s) and acceleration (800°/s²) limits. The validation requires a trajectory of at least 6 distinct waypoints spanning at least 45° of motion in at least 2 joints, recorded in stepping mode. Export the resulting dynamics data to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/dynamics_profile.csv with columns: time_s, j0_pos_deg to j5_pos_deg, j0_vel_degs to j5_vel_degs, and j0_acc_degs2 to j5_acc_degs2. Provide a compliance report at /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/dynamics_report.json containing fields: total_samples, total_waypoints, trajectory_duration_s, max_velocity_degs, max_acceleration_degs2, velocity_violations, acceleration_violations, and a boolean 'compliant' status. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
